content:
🚀 ratty | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an enhanced and visually rich terminal experience by enabling 3D graphics and GPU-accelerated rendering within the terminal interface.
✨ Key Features: • GPU-backed text rendering • Traditional 2D and new 3D mode • Inline 3D objects • Image support (Kitty Graphics Protocol) • Customizable spinning rat cursor
📖 Summary: Ratty is a GPU-accelerated terminal emulator built with Rust and Ratatui, offering traditional 2D text rendering alongside a novel 3D mode. It supports inline 3D objects and image rendering via the Kitty Graphics Protocol, providing a unique visual experience for terminal applications.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
